sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74849" key="o)rempo/tai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεμπόται</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄρος, ἐμπίνω</etym>) <sense id="n74849.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drainers of the mountains,</tr_> epith. of rivers, Orac.ap <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.406e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
